<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko" class="dark">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>AI Game Creative Director: Game Setting Document</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;600;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&family=Outfit:wght@400;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: 'class',
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        primary: '#00F0FF',
                        secondary: '#7000FF',
                        accent: '#FF00E5',
                        darkBg: '#0A0A0C',
                        cardBg: '#16161A',
                        borderClr: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)',
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        display: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif'],
                        body: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
                        mono: ['JetBrains Mono', 'monospace'],
                    },
                    animation: {
                        'glow-slow': 'glow 8s ease-in-out infinite',
                        'float': 'float 6s ease-in-out infinite',
                    },
                    keyframes: {
                        glow: {
                            '0%, 100%': { opacity: 0.3 },
                            '50%': { opacity: 0.6 },
                        },
                        float: {
                            '0%, 100%': { transform: 'translateY(0px)' },
                            '50%': { transform: 'translateY(-10px)' },
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    <style>
        body {
            background-color: #0A0A0C;
            color: #E2E8F0;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        .glass-card {
            background: rgba(22, 22, 26, 0.7);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
            transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }

        .glass-card:hover {
            border-color: rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.4);
            transform: translateY(-4px);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        }

        .prompt-block {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            border-left: 3px solid #00F0FF;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 0.5rem;
            font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            color: #A5B4FC;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .gradient-text {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00F0FF 0%, #7000FF 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }

        .media-container img, .media-container video {
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            border-radius: 0.75rem;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .section-divider {
            height: 1px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.3), transparent);
            margin: 4rem 0;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #0A0A0C;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #2D2D35;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #00F0FF;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="font-body selection:bg-primary selection:text-darkBg">

    <!-- Decorative Elements -->
    <div class="fixed top-0 left-0 w-full h-full pointer-events-none -z-10">
        <div class="absolute top-[-10%] left-[-10%] w-[50%] h-[50%] bg-primary/10 blur-[120px] rounded-full animate-glow-slow"></div>
        <div class="absolute bottom-[-10%] right-[-10%] w-[50%] h-[50%] bg-secondary/10 blur-[120px] rounded-full animate-glow-slow"></div>
    </div>

    <main class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-12 md:py-24">
        
        <!-- Header Section -->
        <header class="mb-16 md:mb-24 text-center md:text-left">
            <div class="inline-block px-4 py-1 mb-6 rounded-full border border-primary/30 bg-primary/5 text-primary text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest animate-pulse">
                    <div class="space-y-2">
                        <dt class="text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-primary font-bold">Perspective</dt>
      ' alt='Male Character Design' />
                    </div>
                    <div class="mt-auto">
                        <div class="prompt-block">
                            <pre><code>[AI GENERATION PROMPT: MALE_CHARACTER]
Art Style: Wuthering Waves Anime Render
Subject: Male Survivor, mid-20s, Urban Fantasy
Key Elements: Tactical gear mixed with civilian clothes, scarred face, holding a modified submachine gun, determined expression.
Setting: Ruined Seoul street background.</code></pre>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Female Character -->
                <div class="glass-card p-6 rounded-2xl flex flex-col h-full">
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-accent" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"></path></svg>
                        Female Character
                    </h3>
                    <div class="media-container">
                        <img src='data:image/jpeg;base64,' alt='Female Character Design' />
                    </div>
                    <div class="mt-auto">
                        <div class="prompt-block" style="border-left-color: #FF00E5;">
                            <pre><code>[AI GENERATION PROMPT: FEMALE_CHARACTER]
Art Style: Cel-shaded High Quality Anime
Subject: Female Hunter, late teens, Agility focus
Key Elements: Tech-wear outfit, neon accents, dual energy blades, dynamic pose, cold gaze.
Atmosphere: Epic, high-contrast lighting.</code></pre>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- World Environments -->
        <section class="mb-20">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-4 mb-12">
                <h2 class="font-display font-black text-4xl uppercase tracking-tight">World Environment <span class="text-secondary">Prompts</span></h2>
                <div class="h-px flex-grow bg-gradient-to-r from-secondary/50 to-transparent"></div>
            </div>

            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-8">
                <!-- Landmark -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-3 glass-card p-6 rounded-2xl">
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-secondary" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M17.657 16.657L13.414 20.9a1.998 1.998 0 01-2.827 0l-4.244-4.243a8 8 0 1111.314 0z"></path><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 11a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z"></path></svg>
                        Landmark Screenshot
                    </h3>
                    <div class="media-container">
                        <img src='data:image/jpeg;base64,' alt='Landmark Screenshot' />
                    </div>
                    <div class="prompt-block" style="border-left-color: #7000FF;">
                        <pre><code>[AI GENERATION PROMPT: LANDMARK]
Setting: Post-apocalyptic N Seoul Tower
Visuals: Tower snapped in half, overgrown with alien vines, massive dimensional rift in the sky, destroyed skyscrapers below.
Style: Cinematic wide shot, anime aesthetic.</code></pre>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Atmosphere -->
                <div class="lg:col-span-2 glass-card p-6 rounded-2xl">
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-secondary" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M3 9a2 2 0 012-2h.93a2 2 0 001.664-.89l.812-1.22A2 2 0 0110.07 4h3.86a2 2 0 011.664.89l.812 1.22A2 2 0 0018.07 7H19a2 2 0 012 2v9a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V9z"></path></svg>
                        근접 전투: 패리
                    </h3>
                    <div class="media-container">
                        <video src='<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Th4cyHIJ8_4?si=AFxRLc3YkjKuow3z" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>' controls loop muted></video>
                    </div>
                    <div class="prompt-block" style="border-left-color: #7000FF;">
                        <pre><code>[AI VIDEO PROMPT: ATMOSPHERE]
Mood: Melancholic yet tense
Scene: Rain falling on a ruined Gangnam district, blue mana particles floating, distant shadows of giant monsters moving between buildings.</code></pre>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

        <!-- Gameplay Demo -->
        <section class="mb-24">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-4 mb-12">
                <h2 class="font-display font-black text-4xl uppercase tracking-tight">Gameplay Demo <span class="text-accent">Preview</span></h2>
                <div class="h-px flex-grow bg-gradient-to-r from-accent/50 to-transparent"></div>
            </div>

            <div class="glass-card p-8 md:p-12 rounded-[2.5rem] border-accent/20 overflow-hidden relative">
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">
                    <div>
                        <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">Combat Mechanics & Visuals</h3>
                        <p class="text-slate-400 mb-8 text-lg">
                            Demonstrating the core loop: High-mobility movement, tactical cover-based shooting, and the 'Burst Skill' activation that transforms the environment.
                        </p>
                        <div class="prompt-block" style="border-left-color: #FF00E5;">
                            <pre><code>[AI VIDEO PROMPT: GAMEPLAY_DEMO]
Perspective: Over-the-shoulder TPS
Action: Character sliding under a car while firing at a swarm of monsters, switching to a heavy energy weapon for a finishing move.
Visual FX: Neon muzzle flashes, slow-motion impact frames, vibrant UI overlays.</code></pre>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="media-container !mb-0">
                        <video src='<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/STy45r-BilA?si=BRqud0tAUr-SVU9H" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>' alt='Gameplay Demo' controls loop muted class="shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(255,0,229,0.2)]"></video>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </section>

    </main>

    <!-- Static Footer Info (No Copyright) -->
    <div class="text-center py-12 border-t border-white/5 opacity-50 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase">
        Generated by AI Engine // Design Protocol v4.0.1
    </div>

</body>
</html>
